25:06 â March 17, 2025
Update to the Enterprise Fraud Management Part
We updated information in the Enterprise Fraud Management (EFM) Part. This update is related to the
announcement
regarding mobile deposits. As of March 16, 2025, EFM captures mobile deposits in Data Ingestion mode. While Data Ingestion mode doesnât trigger alerts for suspicious mobile deposits at this time, EFM users must create a manual alert for suspicious mobile deposits, identify the mobile deposits as Risk, and provide any relevant information to them.
Electronic Transactions Volume
Enterprise Fraud Management Part
Section 8.1, Overview of Managing Transaction Alerts
Removed instructions referencing how legitimate Auto Risk transactions require no action. Legitimate Auto Risk transactions must be identified as No-risk.
Section 8.3, Identifying a Transaction as Legitimate
Removed instructions referencing how legitimate Auto Risk transactions require no action. Legitimate Auto Risk transactions must be identified as No-risk.
Section 8.9, Mobile Deposits in EFM
